heading: Civil penalty
label: 55336 Civil penalty
text: After notice and an opportunity for a hearing, the Secretary of Transportation may impose a civil penalty of not more than $1,000,000 on the owner of an American Great Lakes vessel for any act for which the designation may be revoked under .section 55335 of this title
